events.title: Preschool Story Time
events.description: Stories, songs, and crafts for ages 3-6. Parents welcome!

events.title: GED Tutoring
events.description: Free GED preparation with volunteer tutors. Drop in anytime.

events.title: Lego Club
events.description: Build, create, and imagine with our huge Lego collection. Ages 5-12.

events.title: Adult Book Club
events.description: This month: 'The Women' by Kristin Hannah. New members welcome.

events.title: Teen Art Studio
events.description: Mixed media art workshop for teens. All materials provided.

announcements.title: Summer Reading Program Registration Opens April 1
announcements.body: Get ready for our biggest Summer Reading Program yet! Registration opens April 1 for all ages. Prizes, events, and reading challenges all summer long.

announcements.title: New Self-Checkout Kiosks Available
announcements.body: We've installed two new self-checkout kiosks near the front entrance. Check out books, DVDs, and more in seconds! Staff are happy to help if you need assistance.

staffPicks.title: The Women
staffPicks.author: Kristin Hannah
staffPicks.review: A powerful and emotional story about women who served in Vietnam. Kristin Hannah at her best -- you won't be able to put it down.

staffPicks.title: Atomic Habits
staffPicks.author: James Clear
staffPicks.review: Practical and science-backed strategies for building good habits and breaking bad ones. A must-read for anyone looking to make lasting changes.
